text: By those ňĻwindsňļ sent forth successively,
and those blowing violently,
and those scattering ňĻraincloudsňļ widely!
And ňĻbyňļ those ňĻangelsňļ fully distinguishing ňĻtruth from falsehoodňļ,
and those delivering revelation,
ending excuses and giving warnings.
Surely, what you are promised will come to pass.
So when the stars are put out,
and the sky is torn apart,
and the mountains are blown away,
and the messengers‚Äô time ňĻto testifyňļ comes up‚ÄĒ
for which Day has all this been set?
For the Day of ňĻFinalňļ Decision!
And what will make you realize what the Day of Decision is?
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
Did We not destroy earlier disbelievers?
And We will make the later disbelievers follow them.
This is how We deal with the wicked.
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
Did We not create you from a humble fluid,
placing it in a secure place
until an appointed time? <sup foot_note=1267>1267</sup>
We ňĻperfectlyňļ ordained ňĻits developmentňļ. How excellent are We in doing so!
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
Have We not made the earth a lodging
for the living and the dead,
and placed upon it towering, firm mountains, and given you fresh water to drink?
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
ňĻThe disbelievers will be told,ňļ ‚ÄúProceed into that ňĻFireňļ which you used to deny!
Proceed into the shade ňĻof smokeňļ which rises in three columns,
providing neither coolness nor shelter from the flames.
Indeed, it hurls sparks ňĻas bigňļ as huge castles,
and ňĻas darkňļ as black camels.‚ÄĚ <sup foot_note=1268>1268</sup>

foot_notes.1268: lit., yellow camels. Black camels‚Äô hair glistens yellow in sunlight.

text: Woe on that Day to the deniers!
On that Day they will not ňĻbe in a position toňļ speak,
nor will they be permitted to offer excuses.
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
ňĻThey will be told by Allah,ňļ ‚ÄúThis is the Day of ňĻFinalňļ Decision: We have gathered you along with earlier disbelievers ňĻfor punishmentňļ.
So if you have a scheme ňĻto save yourselvesňļ, then use it against Me.‚ÄĚ
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
Indeed, the righteous will be amid ňĻcoolňļ shade and springs
and any fruit they desire.
ňĻThey will be told,ňļ ‚ÄúEat and drink happily for what you used to do.‚ÄĚ
Surely this is how We reward the good-doers.
ňĻButňļ woe on that Day to the deniers!
‚ÄúEat and enjoy yourselves for a little while, ňĻforňļ you are truly wicked.‚ÄĚ
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
When it is said to them, ‚ÄúBow down ňĻbefore Allah,‚ÄĚ they do not bow.
Woe on that Day to the deniers!
So what message after this ňĻQuranňļ would they believe in?
